---
title: "Eric Pante, PhD"
description: "molecular marine biologist"
image: sea.png
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/ericpante"
    - text: ORCID
      icon: person-circle
      url: "https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7680-2112"
    - text: ResearchGate
      icon: journal
      url: "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Eric-Pante"
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      url: "mailto:eric.pante@cnrs.fr"
    - text: Google Scholar
      icon: mortarboard
      url: "https://scholar.google.fr/citations?user=_jtgsu0AAAAJ&hl=en"
    - text: iNaturalist
      icon: binoculars
      href: "https://www.inaturalist.org/people/7034264"
comments: false
---

I am a [CNRS](http://www.cnrs.fr/) researcher based at the [LABORATOIRE DES SCIENCES](https://www-iuem.univ-brest.fr/lemar/) [DE L’ENVIRONNEMENT MARIN](#0) (LEMAR) in Plouzané, France. I am broadly interested in the molecular ecology of marine organisms, with particular fondness for corals and mollusks. You can learn more on my research here.
